testcase.name: test_respond_survey

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for get_by_role("row", name="Regression Testing N/A").get_by_role("link")

testcase.failure: tests\Survey\test_Respond_survey.py:11: in test_respond_survey survey.respond_to_survey(survey_title="Regression Testing") tests\pages\survey_page.py:97: in respond_to_survey self.page.get_by_role("row", name=f"{survey_title} N/A").get_by_role("link").click() venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\sync_api\_generated.py:15505: in click self._sync( venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_locator.py:160: in click return await self._frame.click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_frame.py:521: in click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:558: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for get_by_role("row", name="Regression Testing N/A").get_by_role("link")
